---
title: "\'Three Generations: In Praise of Dulness\'"
---

## \'Three Generations: In Praise of Dulness\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1898
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Short Story in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 8.29 (Jan 1898) 38-46

### Notes

No author is given but it is part of a series written by CMY

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
